overview: Today is YOUR day. You have a local date in Bradenton with Squilliam from 8 AM to 10 PM—this is the priority. At 7 AM, you'll complete a quick 30-minute work task to upload Outscraper leads to Claude (pool cleaning, pressure washing, and competitor cities). Everything else is scheduled for tomorrow and beyond. Enjoy your date day!

schedule.dayTip: Today is a low-work day by design. Your date with Squilliam is the priority. The 7 AM task is quick and can be done in 30 minutes. Relax and enjoy!
weekHighlights: Sunday 3/23: Clay/Hallwood Bound Presentation + Rush Revisions (~3hrs, $500 revenue), VMC Staff Headshots 2-4 PM at Lakewood Ranch, Start Clay March Newsletter, Peleta Blog Package Follow-Up, Quick Wendy/Robert Seal/Kolby tasks, Test Peleta Newsletter Automation, Weekly Personal Check-In

Monday 3/24: Rooks Advertising In-Office 9AM-5:30PM, CC Quick Tasks 5:30-6:30 PM, Revenue Sprint: Scan CRM for quick-win prospects, Respond to Magate Sekonya, Check in with Nakeitha/Nikki Nyx, Izzy Hangout 7-10 PM
Tuesday 3/25: Rooks Remote at Foxtail 9AM-5PM, Meal Prep 6 PM

Wednesday 3/26: Rooks In-Office 9AM-5:30PM, Invoice Clay Q1 + Rush Fee ($300-500), Reply to Nancy Trinity UMC Logo + Peanut Business Pitch ($300+), Cancel Asana ($61/mo savings), Invoice Peleta $99 Google Workspace, Celine Hangout 7 PM

Thursday 3/27: Wendy/VMC Work Block 9AM-12PM, VMC Tour Section Update (~1.5 hrs, $200), Nancy Trinity UMC Logo Design (~1.25 hrs), Wendy 9x11 Magnet Design Session 1, Nakeitha Discovery Call 1-1:45 PM via HoneyBook/Zoom, Finish Clay March Newsletter, Jus' Poetic Website Revisions, Call Will & Get Ready for Weekend, Sleepover With Squilliam

Key Updates: Peleta confirmed newsletter working smoothly (Fri 11 PM). HoneyBook meeting notes from Peleta call ready. Alignable inquiry about small business websites (potential lead). Contra selected you to apply for Kajabi Expert gig. 5 Instagram DMs including from brycegoesdigital. WordPress developer Ram cold-emailed about subcontracting.

Drafts Ready to Send — NEW COLD OUTREACH: Mr. Handyman (Rob), SpringClear Pool & Spa, In Bloom Lawn & Landscape (Jim - 2 drafts: initial + follow-up), Alberti's On Main, FresKo FadeZ BarberShop, Sarasota Automotive, Magate Sekonya follow-up, Bellagena Med Spa (Julia), Phoenix Massage Spas.
